content:
# 2026-10-07

- [x] Finalize warming-anomaly figure v4
- [ ] Start results narrative
- Call with [[Kai]] tonight. 19 days til the visit.
- Took Yaz + supplements. Cycle was 41 days this round, noting it for [[PCOS - tracking]].

# 2026-10-05

- Meal prep done. Briefly felt like an adult.
- Mom called, confirmed Nov 8 brunch at [[Cafe Rosita]].

# Menge & Sutherland 1976

Disturbance and the structure of rocky-shore communities. Key framing for [[Intertidal zonation]] and my intro. Predation + competition gradient with stress.

# Ocean Acidification Review 2024

Impacts on calcifiers; relevant to [[Warming and community shifts]]. Pull two figures for the discussion.

# Sunflower star recolonization

Faster than modeled on the WA coast. Cautious optimism. Good news angle for [[Discussion outline]].

# Intertidal zonation

Vertical banding driven by emersion stress (top) and biotic interactions (bottom). Connects to [[Menge & Sutherland 1976]].

# Diversity indices

Shannon (H') weights evenness; Simpson (D) weights dominance. Report both. See [[Results - diversity]].

# Warming and community shifts

Core thesis idea: SST anomalies reorganize intertidal invertebrate communities. Evidence-based hope.

# NMDS ordination

Non-metric MDS via vegan. Watch the stress value (<0.2 good). Used for [[Results - diversity]].

# Results - diversity

Shannon/Simpson computed for all 8 sites. Warming correlates with composition shifts. Figures in [[Warming anomaly figure]].

# Discussion outline

1. Restate finding
2. Compare to [[Sunflower star recolonization]]
3. Caveats: [[Site 7 swell exposure]]
4. Earned hope, not tidy answer.

# Site 7 (Titlow Beach) swell exposure

Open question: fold into outer-coast comparison or keep separate? Ask [[Dr. Lindström]] Friday.

# Warming anomaly figure

v4: added 2025 baseline as dashed line. Ready for methods. Share with [[Dr. Hull]] when clean.

# PCOS - tracking (private)

Cycle length this round: 41 days. Yaz daily, inositol 2000mg, D3 2000IU. Next OB-GYN (Dr. Tanaka) Apr 15. Felt steady this month.

# quick capture

- idea: add a download-CSV button to [[tidepool-viz]]
- recipe to try: miso butter noodles
- text Anders re: the new Attenborough ep

# 2026-03-30

- Freezer day. Moved Site 1-4 racks to backup -80.
- Methods draft done. Big relief.

# 2026-03-25

- Lindström comments on Ch 3 landed. Mostly good. Citation + site naming to fix.
- Cried at the kelp forest episode (worth it).

# Field gear checklist

Waders, quadrat, datasheet + pencil, tide chart, gloves, camera, snacks (RXBAR), cold brew. Put rocks back.

# R snippets

- scale predictors before GLMM to fix convergence
- vegan::metaMDS for [[NMDS ordination]]
- always set.seed before ordination

# 2026-03-15

- Standardized tide_height to cm. NMDS mismatch with Elena's data fixed.
- Enrollment cert confirmed for loan deferment.
